name: threshold-architecture-tools
description: Herramientas aisladas para análisis de dependencias de Threshold

scripts.graph:backend: echo ```mermaid > backend-graph.md && npx depcruise ../../backend/ --no-config --exclude "node_modules" --include-only "^../../backend/" --output-type mermaid >> backend-graph.md && echo ``` >> backend-graph.md
scripts.graph:mobile: echo ```mermaid > mobile-graph.md && npx depcruise ../../mobile/src/ ../../mobile/app/ --no-config --exclude "node_modules" --include-only "^../../mobile/" --output-type mermaid >> mobile-graph.md && echo ``` >> mobile-graph.md
